column1: # Alt-F4 coverage for the mutating commands beyond cell-edit and
# row-delete.  Each block performs one mutation, asserts the effect,
# then Alt-F4s and asserts the undo.
# Seed A:A1=1, A:B1=2, A:C1=3 on row 1.
# ---- /WIC (Insert Column): at pointer (C), so 3 shifts right to D ----
# ---- /WDC (Delete Column): at pointer (C), so 3 goes away ----
# ---- /RFC 0 (Currency format, 0 decimals) on A1, then undo ----
